custody_adjustment.warning_message: Alabama uses a separate Shared Physical Custody worksheet (Form CS-42-S) when a parent has roughly 143-164+ overnights/year — this calculator's standard result does not apply. Use Alabama's official shared-custody worksheet for a substantial-timesharing calculation.

deviation_note: Courts may deviate from the guideline amount for documented reasons — this calculator shows the presumptive guideline amount only, not a court order. Above $20,000/month combined income, courts determine support on a case-by-case basis.
